mdRecord.dcterms:title: 2001 Map Showing The Thickness And Character Of Quaternary Sediments In The Glaciated United States East Of The Rocky Mountains Northeastern States, Great Lakes, Parts of Southern Ontario and the Atlantic Offshore Area
